calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-20-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Michael Zalob, Esq. for Plaintiff: Prepress Assembly, Inc.
Plaintiff's witness: Charles Cunningham, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Wine Country Living, LLC, dba Wine Country Living Magazine as follows:
Damages $28,342.31
Prejudgment Interest $1,229.36
Attorney's Fees $2,825.00
Costs $488.75 for a total of $32,885.42
Judgment signed in open court.
